title: Zephyranthes itaobina
taxonomy: Zephyranthes itaobina is classified under the family Amaryllidaceae. This classification places it within the order Asparagales. At the rank of family, it is further grouped with the subfamily Amaryllidoideae. The genus Zephyranthes is also part of this subfamily. Overall, this classification suggests a close relationship with other Amaryllidaceae family members.
